title: What the Iran Attack Means for Neighboring Nations
description: Center for Strategic and International Studies Middle East Program Director and Senior Advisor Mona Yacoubian discusses the attack on Iran and says ‘No doubt that this is a nightmare scenario for the neighboring gulf countries’ and she expects Iran attack to get very complicated  (Source: Bloomberg)
content: Center for Strategic and International Studies Middle East Program Director and Senior Advisor Mona Yacoubian discusses the attack on Iran and says ‘No doubt that this is a nightmare scenario for the neighboring gulf countries’ and she expects Iran attack to get very complicated  (Source: Bloomberg)
